2026-04-07GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityAgreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the Republic of the Philippines concerning the Status of Visiting Forces of Each State in the Territory of the Other StateOrder authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the Republic of the Philippines concerning the Status of Visiting Forces of Each State in the Territory of the Other State.N/A
subject: Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the Republic of the Philippines concerning the Status of Visiting Forces of Each State in the Territory of the Other State
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the Republic of the Philippines concerning the Status of Visiting Forces of Each State in the Territory of the Other State.
